[{"Name":"Rupert Acoustics","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoN7m8NdcQRPMTTp-4ybMxr2wse0w4U4QY7Cw3JKYXIze22Rs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just installed a couple of drop ceilings for Shane on one of his small renovations. From a subcontractors point of view, Shane was awesome to deal with. He was responsive with any questions, and easy to talk though any problems or "job conditions" with. I was on site to see his interactions with the home owner and was very impressed. He was calm, patient and always had a smile. I look forward to hopefully doing more work along side Shane and his team.

(Note: Tiles have been left out because the electrician still needs to finish)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICD56OzDA&fid=0x0:0x8515282d0fc77be9"],"When":"2024-4-2"},{"Name":"Wendy Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLT_UHw5RErjQLjq8a3NRycoXjLjGhDTJ_E_GblFHo3L3WPEw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Green Emerald Construction built our home in a new development in Sicamous. We absolutely love our home and neighborhood. The house was constructed with SIP walls and retains it's coolness in the summer and warmth in the winter. We have spacious rooms and equally spacious halls and doorways. Gary and Shane gave us ideas and asked for our contributions at all times. We were able to reach out to either of them at any time, and they would answer the call (if not, they returned our calls within 24 hours). They were also able to return to fix a couple of minor issues and they always take the time for a personal chat. We wish them all the best and highly recommend their services. Thank you Gary and Shane Arsenault.
Ralph & Wendy","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Cousens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5NA8DGP0qP2EIT2UL2qmX2jxSWdJic26mf8fEbopondLsOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have done a number of foundation subcontracts for Green Emerald Construction over the years and have always enjoyed the friendly, co-operative and safe work environment that Green Emerald's has provided. Their commitment to high quality building practices gives us the confidence to continue working collaboratively to give the best product possible to all the customers that they serve.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcurPKdQ&fid=0x0:0x8515282d0fc77be9"],"When":"2020-1-30"},{"Name":"Stephanie Herlick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6fm5yv1MxTWw-9SUq9pBo9B8hqrxxnuP6JfYctMenqDQ2LEYu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Here is a review we have just received from some of our wonderful clients:

Building a custom home with Green Emerald was a first for us. We had never designed and built a custom home before and had never lived in the Shuswap region before. We placed our trust in Green Emerald Construction and 12 months later, we had a beautiful, quality built, forever home. Gary and Marilla were terrific to work with. Impressively, they answered their phones and shared their expertise with patience and friendliness. Their ideas and advice proved sound and have added to the enjoyment of our home.

We are particularly happy with the Structural Insulated Panels (SIP) that were used in the building of our home. We can feel the difference between our house and a frame constructed house. Our SIP built home feels more cozy and comfortable. Previously, we lived in a 1487 square foot rancher on a crawl space on the West Coast. Our current house built with SIP construction is 3482 square feet with a basement and many large windows. I compared the gas bills from each home over a period of 8 months. Six of the eight months we paid less for gas here in the Shuswap than we did for our smaller timber framed house on the coast. (The shoulder months were more expensive here in the Shuswap than on the coast as winter came sooner and lasted longer.)

I am thrilled that Green Emerald uses SIP and that it has made such a happy difference in our heating costs. I would recommend to everyone who is building a home in Canada to use SIP construction.

Gayle and Frank","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Welsh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJf_rZKS3VGxgu4Qk-Db54CFoTF75DI9pdEMpU6mB8ozl2mlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We purchased our home from Gary ( Green Emerald Construction ) in June 2016, the house was not finished so Gary let us put our finishing touches on it. He was very helpful and professional through out the whole process. We are very pleased with the house and love the location. Thanks Gary","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marta Mor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlHq5PHIiBH1MRlP6xgSFGXXFmA9jk6s5H3Ysl_bRxTK80Kg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marta and Bob: A beautifully designed and superbly constructed home by Green Emerald Estates located in this new Upper Lakeshore neighbourhood--and now my husband and I have the privilege of owning this gem. Gary Arsenault and his team were a pleasure to work with. Any changes we requested were attended to promptly. Tradespeople are professional and courteous.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tom Grady","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDS4f7nqSV7_gUqYiv4jyCG_H4z3fZhHfjkZCRHJ2sLSDfTv7N=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gary Arsenault and the Green Emerald team built our custom house in 2016/17. They met all our requirements and completed the project on time. We love our neighbourhood and living in the Shuswap in our new house.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Annette Cosens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUBgqSQos0drM0P3aqXJtHAquUxl6hMC8ABbXb0DwO-0rh0hBw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Green Emerald Construction are very fine builders. title: Integrity Roofing Corp.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Barbara Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrRGvyV8rlVHq3o_joh6LEmx0UJ00k29Tp2f2ip3OoZiKhybuJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Integrity is the most honest roofing company I have ever dealt with! Josh was a great guy and the only HONEST one! I very highly recommend this company, I will be using them in the future as well as recommending to friends family and neighbors!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Nodelyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUweAqdcFRAbbaIBpJmt80ofAMqq4LhQ4i3uWS0Nq__VuXw_M80UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Installation was great, but cleanup poor. I spent several days picking up nails from my lawn - hundreds of them. Also the plastic strips on the underside of every shingle that overhangs is coming off in little bits and a year and a half after installation I'm still cleaning that stuff up. Top notch installation but poor work on the details. Wouldn't recommend.

Edit two and a half years after installation:
Every time the wind blows, I am reminded of Integrity Roofing. The plastic from the underside of all the shingles around the edge of the roof is slowly starting to come off. Now they are incessantly fluttering in the breeze with a crinkling sound like a candy wrapper. This sucks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDc4OLTBQ&fid=0x0:0xfe3997aaa8cf3c2a"],"When":"2020-5-13"},{"Name":"Laura Bontron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzO-z5w0V_5cNqqLKIs-PJk1_X49XjSOVkvVDwLHa8zwD4WQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"UPDATE 17APR23:
Integrity Roofing did respond to our calls/email and it was their preference to issue a refund due to our dissatisfaction with the work completed.

************

We hired Integrity Roofing to repair a leaky skylight at our recreational property in Blind Bay in August 2022. Understandably they were busy but agreed to do the work, after waiting several months we had closed our property for the season prior to them doing the work in October 2022 when we weren’t there. We paid on time for the work completed $1,522.59 however when we returned to the property this Spring and inspected the work it was not done well or satisfactory. The frame the the skylight sits on is made from a piece of lumber that shouldn’t have even been sold, it framing is crooked, the interior surround has been cracked, there are gaps not filled, the skylight is scratched, new roof tile was not installed around the flashing. We have called several times to discuss and they refuse to return our calls. Very disappointed, would not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Len Youden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCqgB-1EyohD6iLbr6zf_Qt1Ye01_EV3ERzHTJ35BTkX24XQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had our detached garage/shop roof done with gutters by integrity roofing. Josh and Jason were great. Price was right on quote and Jody from the office was easy to deal with. I recommend using them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Neroas25 L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsO3QQ8b7GuIh7SOXIR7jP8gMKPnNQfwdLeWg3b4SLo93FlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Integrity Roofing has been there for us with various issues we have had, it was a no brainer to go with them for our roof install. Thank you Josh, Jason, Natasha, Aaron & Brian!  - Dale","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bill Cooper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEuHHApPazQYHkupyZdN0-A1gCRp6D_hXNbrFq9LFIw-BkAA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best roofing company in the Shuswap! title: Redpoint Construction Ltd.
address: 560 20 St SE, Salmon Arm, BC V1E 2J8
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kyle Routledge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbnXocaOqey5jmBg78hIHTBsRnw_WtWEd_IDk3Gj-TVd08yejr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired RedPoint in 2024 to help us undertake a pretty substantial home renovation. The job was complex, and the timing was not ideal–an overwinter job (our choosing) and while expecting our third child. For several months, Jacob and his crew were at our home, accommodating our needs, and working tirelessly to keep the disturbances minimal. Everyone on the crew has repeatedly impressed us, not only with the quality of work, but with how they have interacted with our entire family.
With RedPoint, you will get:
• Great communication – Jacob and Sheri are prompt in their responses and always have their crew show up on time and ready to go.
• Hard workers – every crew member that has helped our project take shape puts in a full days’ effort, rain or shine (even in temperatures in the negative teens!).
• Masters of their craft – the attention to detail and quality of work that we have seen at every turn has only reinforced how happy we are to have found this team.
• Fair rates – the rates charged by Jacob and each of his crew members are very fair and a full, transparent breakdown of hours worked and expenses incurred is provided on every invoice.
• Respect, kindness, and integrity – Jacob and Sheri (and their entire crew) have consistently treated my wife and myself, our three children, and our pup with some much kindness and respect, and always do what’s right by their customers.
Our project is not yet complete, but there is no other contractor we’d rather work with to finish the job. We love what has been done so far and look forward to seeing the final product come together.
Thanks Jacob and Sheri (and Matt, Jason, Wade, and Rick), keep up the great work!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwFw73ljhB8yAkusPP-j7s&fid=0x0:0x70ee68193afa8eb6"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"Jessica Blundell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_7j6gQ_52l5VLZ8ib1UbSBRkv8CLkkvt_ZzbXYOSfVcYfbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Firstly, I would like to say, this entire experience was better than I could have imagined.
We recently hired Redpoint in 2025 for a major project on our home: replacing all the siding, windows and updating our deck. Additionally finishing and siding our shop, and we couldn't be happier with the results.

From the very beginning, communication was excellent. Jacob provided a detailed and transparent quote, and they were always quick to respond to our questions. There was never any waiting. We always felt like we were their priority even when we knew he was busy. They helped us choose the right materials, colours and design for the project, offering valuable insights. It was clear he understood what we wanted and how to achieve it for us. At times we were not sure exactly how we wanted certain elements to look, and we felt completely confident trusting his Jacob's judgment. Jacob and his team took our preferences and aesthetic and made smart design choices that turned out better than we could have imagined. We were so happy mid project we even decided to add additional things to the project. Jacob had no problem rolling with it and made it easy. Jacob and his guys were exceptionally easy and accommodating to work with.

The crew were top notch. Everyone was professional, skilled, and incredibly efficient. They showed up on time every day and worked hard to complete the job on schedule. The quality of their work is outstanding; the new siding, windows looks flawless and the deck is exactly what we envisioned. They paid close attention to detail, and the job site was kept clean and tidy throughout the entire process. They were very professional and treated our home with respect. It was very clear they take pride in their work.

We are so impressed with the transformation of our home. It looks amazing. Better than we could have ever imagined. We highly recommend Redpoint for any project. We have full intentions of having them return to complete our Kitchen reno next.  They are a reliable and trustworthy team that delivers exceptional results and I would highly recommend them.

Thank you Jacob and his amazing team of builders!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"TJ Wiebe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLd6zQrLsDBVS9i5nlmW2aJeHF67oOq6Zc3aQVGRnG2VOvY0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve had the chance to put our coating systems on a number of decks built by Redpoint Construction, and every single one has been immaculate. Their framing and finishing work is always clean, precise, and well thought out, which makes our job much easier. You can tell they take pride in their craft—their decks are solid, square, and built to last. On top of that, Redpoint handles top-quality construction from start to finish—they truly do everything. As a coatings company, we see a lot of different builders’ work, and Redpoint’s stands out every time. Highly recommend them for anyone looking for top-quality  construction.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jody Sennett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURk1YulmhRdk4cYMvPWQhnLnnOEp6tD7BdHoLPs4zerlAdljk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Redpoint Construction was professional and fair, quality of work could not have been better. Project was completed on time and on budget. Team was clean, respectful and organized. We were away from home and we trusted them in our home alone, quality photos, texts and phone calls all appreciated. We highly recommend Jacob and Sheri they are the real deal for construction work, thank you and very happy with end results. If we have any future work, you will be our first call. Mike & Jody, Blind Bay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luc Provencher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIJkhLfwrtJGBz-VGx5qc1jzxO8hDgK9KirgP1C-6aQZrJOh7RlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team here are great people to work with and very knowledgeable about the field.
